name: Browse catalog
description: End user browses the product catalog
mermaidDsl:
internet_user ->> webfrontend: Browse catalog
webfrontend ->> api_backend: GET /catalog
api_backend ->> catalog_service: fetchProducts()
catalog_service ->> mydb_storage: SELECT products
mydb_storage -->> catalog_service: products[]
catalog_service -->> api_backend: products[]
api_backend -->> webfrontend: 200 OK
webfrontend -->> internet_user: Display catalog

name: Place order
description: End user places an order — stock check, payment, persistence
mermaidDsl:
internet_user ->> webfrontend: Place order
webfrontend ->> api_backend: POST /orders
api_backend ->> command_service: createOrder()
command_service ->> catalog_service: checkStock()
catalog_service ->> mydb_storage: SELECT stock
mydb_storage -->> catalog_service: stock
catalog_service -->> command_service: stockOk
command_service ->> mydb_storage: INSERT order
command_service ->> ordering_service: processOrder()
ordering_service ->> payment_service: processPayment()
payment_service -->> ordering_service: paymentConfirmed
ordering_service ->> mydb_storage: UPDATE order status
ordering_service -->> command_service: orderConfirmed
command_service -->> api_backend: orderId
api_backend -->> webfrontend: 201 Created
webfrontend -->> internet_user: Order confirmed

name: Check order status
description: End user checks the status of an existing order
mermaidDsl:
internet_user ->> webfrontend: Check order status
webfrontend ->> api_backend: GET /orders/{id}
api_backend ->> ordering_service: getOrderStatus()
ordering_service ->> mydb_storage: SELECT order
mydb_storage -->> ordering_service: order
ordering_service -->> api_backend: orderStatus
api_backend -->> webfrontend: 200 OK
webfrontend -->> internet_user: Display status

name: Update catalog (admin)
description: Admin updates a product in the catalog
mermaidDsl:
internet_user ->> webfrontend: Update product
webfrontend ->> api_backend: PUT /catalog/{id}
api_backend ->> command_service: updateProduct()
command_service ->> catalog_service: updateCatalogEntry()
catalog_service ->> mydb_storage: UPDATE product
mydb_storage -->> catalog_service: updated
catalog_service -->> command_service: ok
command_service -->> api_backend: success
api_backend -->> webfrontend: 200 OK
webfrontend -->> internet_user: Product updated
